# Computer Science & Engineering

Established 2007

[Faculty](/departments/cse/faculty)[Apply Now](/admissions)

## Vision & Mission

### Vision

To be a center of excellence in computer science education and research, producing globally competent professionals.

### Mission

* Provide quality education in computer science with emphasis on practical skills
* Foster innovation and research in emerging technologies
* Develop industry-ready professionals with ethical values
* Promote entrepreneurship and lifelong learning

## Programs Offered

### B.E. Computer Science & Engineering

Duration: 4 yearsIntake: 120

### M.E. Computer Science & Engineering

Duration: 2 yearsIntake: 18

## Labs & Facilities

### Laboratories

* Programming Lab
* Data Structures Lab
* Database Lab
* Networks Lab
* AI/ML Lab
* Software Engineering Lab
* Mobile Computing Lab

### Facilities

* High-speed Internet connectivity
* Licensed software and tools
* Project rooms
* Seminar halls
* Digital library access
